title: Salty Mediterranean Lettuce Salad
description: A refreshing and nostalgic mediterranean dish featuring tender iceberg lettuce paired with crispy fried potatoes for a salty twist, perfect as a side or light meal.
instructions: Slice the iceberg lettuce leaves into bite-sized pieces.
Peel and thinly slice the red onions.
Heat a skillet over medium heat, add olive oil and sliced potatoes. Fry until golden brown and crispy.
In another pan, sauté minced red onion in olive oil until translucent and slightly caramelized.
Combine fried potato slices with lettuce leaves, adding fried red onions on top if desired.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
